Jechiel (or Jechavel), the name of eight Israelites
20.dv: or (2 Chronicles 29:14) יְחַוְאֵל; from H2421 (חָיָה) and H410 (אֵל); God will live;

20.gl: Shemiramoth, the name of two Israelites
20.dv: or שְׁמָרִימוֹת; probably from H8034 (שֵׁם) and plural of H7413 (רָמָה); name of heights;

20.gl: Zecarjah, the name of twenty-nine Israelites
20.dv: or זְכַרְיָהוּ; from H2142 (זָכַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has remembered;

20.gl: Benajah, the name of twelve Israelites
20.dv: or בּנָיָהוּ; (prolonged) from H1129 (בָּנָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has built;

20.gl: Maasejah, the name of sixteen Israelites
20.dv: or מַעֲשֵׂיָהוּ; from H4639 (מַעֲשֶׂה) and H3050 (יָהּ); work of Jah;

21.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
21.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
21.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

21.gl: Jeiel, the name of six Israelites
21.dv: from H3261 (יָעָה) and H410 (אֵל); carried away of God;

21.gl: Obed-Edom, the name of five Israelites
21.dv: from the active participle of H5647 (עָבַד) and H123 (אֱדֹם); worker of Edom;

21.gl: Mattithjah, the name of four Israelites
21.dv: or מַתִּתְיָהוּ; from H4991 (מַתָּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); gift of Jah;

21.gl: Azazjah, the name of three Israelites
21.dv: from H5810 (עָזַז) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has strengthened;
from H410 (אֵל) and H6395 (פָּלָה); God of his distinction;

22.gl: a burden; specifically, tribute, or (abstractly) porterage; figuratively, an utterance, chiefly adoom, especially singing; mental, desire
22.kj: burden, carry away, prophecy, [idiom] they set, song, tribute.

22.gl: to chastise, literally (with blows) or figuratively (with words); hence, to instruct
22.kj: bind, chasten, chastise, correct, instruct, punish, reform, reprove, sore, teach.

22.gl: a head person (of any rank or class)
22.kj: captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward.

22.dv: or כְּנַנְיָהוּ; from H3661 (כָּנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has planted;

22.gl: a Levite or descendant of Levi

23.gl: Berekjah, the name of six Israelites
23.dv: or בֶּרֶכְיָהוּ; from H1290 (בֶּרֶךְ) and H3050 (יָהּ); knee (i.e. blessing) of Jah;
or שֹׁעֵר active participle of H8176 (שָׁעַר) (as denominative from H8179 (שַׁעַר));

23.gl: Elkanah, the name of several Israelites
23.dv: from H410 (אֵל) and H7069 (קָנָה); God has obtained;
or אָרֹן; from H717 (אָרָה) (in the sense of gathering);

24.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
24.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
24.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

24.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.
